---
title: "Research Connections"
description: '<a href="research-connections.pdf" download>Download PDF</a>'
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 1in
      y: 1in
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[Download PDF](research-connections.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="research-connections.pdf" role="button"}
:::

Instructions for Research Connections Presentation
